name: Mint Julep Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and soda water in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Stir until all the sugar is dissolved.
3. Add the lime juice concentrate and lemonade concentrate, then stir well.
4. Incorporate the Creme de Menthe topping and mix thoroughly.
5. Bring the mixture to just below the boiling point (210°F).
6. Do not boil the mixture.
7. Remove from heat and allow it to cool.
8. Chill the syrup.
9. Mix at a ratio of 1 part syrup to 5 parts chilled water for serving.
Yield: 2 quarts.
